title: Gifts to an attesting witness or to wife or husband of attesting witness to be void

rules.condition: A beneficiary (or their spouse) acts as a witness to the will
rules.action: The gift to that beneficiary is rendered void
rules.notes: The will itself remains valid, but the specific geometric gift to the witness fails.

witnesses.presence: Must be present at the same time when the testator signs or acknowledges the signature
witnesses.capacity: Must be sound of mind and not blind

testator.capacity: Must have testamentary capacity (sound mind, memory, and understanding)
